reasoning: Query asks for fireworks (花火大会) but get_festivals returns general intangible folk-cultural properties with no fireworks. 312 results returned but none appear to be hanabi festivals in the visible sample. No date filtering possible. Good schema with source_url, qid, designation, but category mismatch is the core issue.
missing_entities: major fireworks festivals such as Sumida River Fireworks, Nagaoka Fireworks
improvement_hint: Add category/theme filtering to get_festivals so fireworks (花火大会) queries can target that subset; or add a fireworks-specific tag to relevant festivals.

reasoning: Same as L3-01 but in Japanese lang=ja. Response correctly returns ja-language names and descriptions. Still no fireworks-specific results in the visible items; dataset is intangible folk-cultural properties with no hanabi events. Schema is solid.
missing_entities: 隅田川花火大会、長岡花火など主要花火大会
improvement_hint: Classify 花火大会 events in the festival dataset and add a keyword/category filter to expose them.

reasoning: Query asks for snow festivals in Hokkaido; prefecture filter returned 0 local items. national_heritage fallback returns UNESCO ICH entries from Akita, Saitama, Toyama — none from Hokkaido, none snow-related. Sapporo Snow Festival entirely absent. Poor geographic and topical relevance.
missing_entities: Sapporo Snow Festival (さっぽろ雪まつり)
improvement_hint: Expand Hokkaido festival coverage; add snow/winter theme tagging; Sapporo Snow Festival should be in the dataset.

reasoning: Query is Chinese, asking for rural village life experience. get_japan_heritage returns 104 Japan Heritage stories with Chinese translations. First item is Asuka women's history — not countryside rural life. Kamakura story also present. Content is legitimate heritage but not well-matched to 田舎暮らし intent. Translation quality appears good.
improvement_hint: Add semantic/theme search to get_japan_heritage so rural life (里山、農村) queries surface relevant heritage stories like satoyama entries.

reasoning: Korean query about autumn foliage; search_area('紅葉') returns 83 results but top entries are an erosion-control facility and Momijidani Park in Hiroshima — not iconic koyo spots. Famous sites like Nikko, Arashiyama not visible. heritage_designations, prominence_score, kinds all present. Ranking needs improvement.
missing_entities: 日光いろは坂、嵐山など有名紅葉スポット
improvement_hint: Improve prominence ranking for autumn-foliage queries; weight well-known koyo spots (Nikko, Arashiyama) higher.

reasoning: Meditation / quiet temple query returns 修行-related wikidata entries plus noisy municipal scrape spots (STAY YAMAGATA tourism site). Manjushuin temple in Kyoto appears with heritage designations but no kinds. Several results lack coordinates or kinds. Mixed quality; thematic relevance is partial.
wrong_facts: description_en 'anglican priest' for Manjushuin is incorrect metadata
improvement_hint: Fix incorrect description_en on Q3076940 (Manjushuin); filter out portal/homepage scrapes in thematic search results.

reasoning: Spanish query asks for aurora borealis in Japan. The search returns 86 hits for オーロラ but results are Oita onsen cookie-consent pages, Sanrio Puroland, Furano DMO plan chunks mentioning Australia. No aurora-viewing location in Hokkaido returned. The query intent is unserviceable with current data.
missing_entities: Aurora viewing in Hokkaido (e.g. 北海道陸別町)
improvement_hint: Add aurora/natural-phenomenon category; surface Hokkaido aurora spots; consider a graceful no-match response when results are thematically irrelevant.

reasoning: Query about 100-year-old farmhouse stays in Japan; tool fetches Gifu hotels. Returns lodging list with OSM and wikidata sources, coordinates, types. Takayama area is appropriate for machiya/kominka stays. However no kominka/古民家 classification, no website for most, no description of age or style. Schema functional but not rich enough for this query.
improvement_hint: Add lodging_style or tags (kominka, ryokan, machiya) to hotel records; enrich descriptions to indicate architectural character.

reasoning: Thai query about hidden cherry blossom spots; search_area('桜') returns 165 results with heritage items. Sakurada-mon (ICP, prominence 0.9), Sakurajima appear. Results include heritage_designations_labels and prominence_score. However top-ranked items are an erosion facility name-match and a railway station — not cherry blossom viewing spots per se.
improvement_hint: Separate name-match results (places with 桜 in name) from semantic matches (cherry blossom viewing spots); boost parks/gardens with cherry associations in ranking.

reasoning: Photography/dramatic landscape query; search_area('絶景') returns 52 hits. Top results are cookie-consent pages from Iwate tourism, a '絶景' feature guide from Ehime, and STAY YAMAGATA portal. Minimal structured wikidata entities for actual scenic spots. Mount Fuji, Japan Alps, Shikoku cliffs all absent from top results.
missing_entities: 富士山、天橋立など代表的絶景スポット
improvement_hint: Add scenic/landscape category and curated 絶景 spots to wikidata layer; improve scrape quality to exclude cookie-only pages.

reasoning: Arabic query about outdoor hot springs in nature (not hotels). search_area('露天風呂') returns 72 hits including onsen descriptions with useful content (Iwate, Yamaguchi onsen sites). Actual spot-level data with coordinates is sparse; mostly municipal scrape pages. No wikidata onsen entities with kinds='onsen' visible.
improvement_hint: Add wikidata onsen entities with kinds='onsen'/'hot_spring' and outdoor tags; filter out cookie-consent-only scrape pages.

reasoning: Wild dolphin swimming query; search_area('イルカ') returns 60 results. Top hit is Kyoto tourism ambassador page entirely unrelated. Noto aquarium dolphin show mentioned in a scrape. No wild dolphin swimming locations (e.g. Mikurajima, Amami) appear. Poor thematic relevance.
improvement_hint: Add marine wildlife category; tag Mikurajima and similar spots with dolphin/whale-watching kinds; filter portal pages from search results.

reasoning: Traditional architecture query served by get_japan_heritage (en). Returns 104 Japan Heritage stories with English translations, source_url, prefecture_codes. Items include Asuka and Kamakura. Tool is thematically relevant but stories are not filtered to architecture/townscape topics. No 重伝建 (Important Preservation District) data appears.
improvement_hint: Add 重要伝統的建造物群保存地区 dataset or filter Japan Heritage by 建造物/まちなみ theme for architecture queries.

reasoning: Vietnamese query about Ainu culture in Hokkaido. Returns 94 results with strong Ainu dataset: National Ainu Museum (Upopoy), Nibutani Ainu Culture Museum, Ainu Cultural Landscape, Hokkaido Ainu Center — all in Hokkaido with coordinates, kinds=museum, heritage_designations. Relevant and well-structured.
improvement_hint: Add heritage_designations_labels for Q64576748 (currently showing QID raw); resolve label for Ainu Cultural Landscape designation.

reasoning: Cliff-carved Buddhist statue query; top results are Usuki Stone Buddhas (National Treasure, Special Historic Site, prominence 0.9) and Oya-dera (Special Historic Site) — the two most famous magaibutsu in Japan, ranked correctly. 75 results returned. Heritage designations, source_url, coordinates all present. Excellent response.
improvement_hint: Add kinds='magaibutsu' or 'rock_carving' to improve semantic classification of these entities.

reasoning: Volcano day-hike from Tokyo query. search_area('火山') returns 56 hits. Top hit is a minor mountain in Fukuoka named 火山 (Hiyama). Aso volcano content comes from Chinese-language Kumamoto scrape pages. Mount Fuji, Hakone, Nikko Shirane absent from top results. No kinds='volcano' classification visible.
missing_entities: 富士山、箱根、那須岳など東京近郊の火山
improvement_hint: Add kinds='volcano'/'stratovolcano' to wikidata entities; improve prominence ranking so active accessible volcanoes near Tokyo rank above minor named mountains.

reasoning: Indonesian query about fresh temple tofu. search_area('豆腐') returns 93 results. Top hits are unrelated portal pages (Fukui, Iwate ryokan, Kumamoto food guide). One GI-designated frozen tofu (岩出山凍り豆腐) appears late. No temple tofu experience locations. Very low thematic relevance.
missing_entities: 精進料理・豆腐体験スポット（高野山、永平寺など）
improvement_hint: Add culinary experience category; tag temple cuisine (精進料理) locations; filter cookie-only scrape pages from results.

reasoning: Fishing village query; search_area('漁港') returns 81 results. Kesennuma port DMO description is rich and relevant. Niigata fish market scrape appears. Some heritage content (Arafune Wind Cave, a WHS component) appears. Mostly scrape-based. No structured fishing-village entities with coordinates. Mixed relevance.
improvement_hint: Add kinds='fishing_port'/'fishing_village' to wikidata layer; tag preservation districts with seafaring heritage.

reasoning: Traditional paper-making query; get_local_specialty(category='craft') returns 231 METI-designated traditional crafts. Top items are Ainu textiles and silk weaves — not washi. Washi (Echizen, Mino, Nishinouchi) likely present in dataset but not surfaced in top items. Schema excellent: craft_id, source_url, prefecture_codes, description bilingual.
missing_entities: 越前和紙、美濃和紙、西ノ内和紙などの和紙工芸品
improvement_hint: Add keyword/industry_category filter to get_local_specialty so washi queries surface paper crafts; or add a q= search param.

reasoning: Jidaigeki scenery/post-town query in Japanese. search_area('宿場') returns 89 results. Top spots include Nagano post-town features (Subarakujuku, Yanagimachi) with rich descriptions, Akasaka Geihinkan (National Treasure). Mixed types: municipal scrape articles about Nakasendo, wikidata heritage entries. Relevant but no 重伝建 district entities.
missing_entities: 妻籠宿、馬籠宿などの重伝建宿場町
improvement_hint: Add Important Preservation Districts (重伝建) for post-towns to wikidata layer to surface them in 宿場 queries.

reasoning: Hidden beaches query; search_area('ビーチ') returns 79 results. Top entries are Minami Chita Beach Land (amusement park), Oiso Long Beach, Naminoue Beach in Okinawa — reasonable beach entries with coordinates and kinds='beach'. Good coverage of Okinawa beaches. Lesser-known beaches hard to surface without touristic-pressure metadata.
improvement_hint: Add visitor_volume or tourism_pressure metadata to beaches to help distinguish crowded vs quiet spots.

reasoning: Local izakaya alley query; search_area('横丁') returns 79 results. Top hits are 横丁公園 (a park), a Saga tourism scrape, an amusement ride. Famous yokocho like Yurakucho, Nonbei Yokocho, Omoide Yokocho absent. No kinds='izakaya_alley' classification. Very poor thematic match.
missing_entities: 思い出横丁、有楽町ガード下など有名居酒屋横丁
improvement_hint: Add kinds='yokocho'/'izakaya_alley' to wikidata entities; ingest major bar-alley spots as distinct entities.

reasoning: German query about rural train travel in Japan. search_area('ローカル線') returns 57 results. Good Nagano local-line article from go-nagano.net with rich description. Ibaraki nemophila rail route present. DMO plan chunks from Tsugaru and Kyushu appear. No wikidata railway-line entities. Schema weak for this tool type but content is thematically useful.
improvement_hint: Add wikidata scenic railway entities (観光列車) with kinds='scenic_railway'; reduce DMO-plan chunk noise in search results.

reasoning: Firefly viewing query. search_area('ホタル') returns 73 results. Toyoda Firefly Museum in Yamaguchi present (kinds=museum), Hotaru-no-Sato park in Hyogo. Yamaguchi firefly boat-ride description is excellent and factual. Kenroku-en firefly event mentioned. Decent coverage but wikidata entities sparse; famous Genji-firefly sites (e.g. Gifu Seki) not visible.
improvement_hint: Add firefly viewing sites as wikidata entities with kinds='nature_spot'; add seasonal metadata for firefly season (June).

reasoning: Russian query about crane (tsuru/ツル bird) watching in winter. search_area('鶴') returns 165 results. Top hit is Tsurugaoka Hachimangu shrine (shrine, not bird). Kakurinji temples follow. Crane-watching sites like Izumi (Kagoshima), the world's largest wintering ground for cranes, entirely absent. Character-match issue: 鶴 returns place-names, not wildlife sites.
missing_entities: 出水市ツル渡来地 (Izumi crane wintering site, Kagoshima)
improvement_hint: Add wildlife-watching category and crane wintering sites as distinct entities; consider wildlife= tag separate from place-name matching for 鶴.
